recommendations.title: The Family Fang
recommendations.overview: A brother and sister return to their family home in search of their world famous parents who have disappeared.

recommendations.title: Bad Words
recommendations.overview: Forty-year-old misanthrope, Guy Trilby, enters the National Golden Quill Spelling Bee through a loophole in the rules.

recommendations.title: Wonder Woman 1984
recommendations.overview: A botched store robbery places Wonder Woman in a global battle against a powerful and mysterious ancient force that puts her powers in jeopardy.

recommendations.title: Black Friday
recommendations.overview: A group of toy store employees must protect each other from a horde of parasite infected shoppers.

recommendations.title: Empire Records
recommendations.overview: The employees of an independent music store learn about each other as they try to stop the store from being absorbed by a large chain.

recommendations.title: She's Out of My League
recommendations.overview: When he starts dating drop-dead gorgeous Molly, insecure airport security agent Kirk can't believe it. As his friends and family share their doubts about the relationship lasting, Kirk does everything he can to avoid losing Molly forever.

recommendations.title: Marvel One-Shot: A Funny Thing Happened on the Way to Thor's Hammer
recommendations.genres: Science Fiction, Fantasy, Adventure, Action, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Agent Coulson stops at a convenience store and deals with a coincidental robbery during his visit.

recommendations.title: Mannequin
recommendations.overview: Jonathan Switcher, an unemployed artist, finds a job as an assistant window dresser for a department store. When Jonathan happens upon a beautiful mannequin he previously designed, she springs to life and introduces herself as Emmy, an Egyptian under

recommendations.title: Lamp Life
recommendations.overview: Bo Peep explains what happened to herself and her sheep between the events of Toy Story 2 and Toy Story 4.

recommendations.title: Fantastic Mr. Fox
recommendations.overview: The Fantastic Mr. Fox, bored with his current life, plans a heist against the three local farmers. The farmers, tired of sharing their chickens with the sly fox, seek revenge against him and his family.
